title: Field GDB — rewrite path from field binutils + AI decode/repair
motto: Debug face is ours — colors, graphs, Ironclad truth, bugfinder repair.

1_field_face.statement: MI/batch bridge, g16-objdump disasm, ANSI/HTML highlight, chart JSON, bugfinder decode/repair

2_ptrace_core.statement: Field ptrace session — breakpoints, watchpoints, register read without host gdb UI

3_full_rewrite.statement: Native debugger consuming g16 binutils DWARF — GPLv3 toolchain already vendored

capabilities.ai_repair: bugfinder findings → ranked patch hints → queen launch verify

ironclad: Decode/repair receipts land on Ironclad — no repair without corroborated KB hit
